title: Cuneiform Tablet #0343: Ur III Literary
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a literary document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a literary document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Literary document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records literary matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
